## Type of change

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (no lint errors)
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes (code formatted)
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] No changes to existing DB schema columns (would break Tableau)
